metadata.name: English Learning Topic Bank
metadata.description: Hard-coded topic bank for an English learning app. Each section contains exactly 16 topics for TOEIC 4 skills and IELTS Speaking/Writing.
recommendedUsage: Use topics as fixed seeds in the app.
Let AI generate dynamic questions, model answers, feedback, vocabulary, and rubrics from each topic.
Teachers can filter by exam, skill, section, level, and taskType.

photoLinkStrategy.prototype: Photo-based topics contain direct imageUrl and thumbnailUrl fields.
photoLinkStrategy.production: Replace dynamic placeholder URLs with selected licensed images and cache them in your own CDN/storage.
photoLinkStrategy.note: Unsplash Source-style dynamic URLs are avoided because that endpoint has been deprecated for new projects.

topics.description: Practice topic for TOEIC Listening - Part 1 - Photographs: Office workers at desks.
samplePrompts: Create a TOEIC Part 1 photo description task about Office workers at desks. Include 4 answer choices.
Generate a teacher-friendly lesson activity for the topic: Office workers at desks.
Create vocabulary, useful expressions, and follow-up questions for: Office workers at desks.
teacherNotes: Use this as a fixed topic seed; let AI generate varied tasks, questions, answers, and feedback.
Adjust output difficulty based on learner level.
Prioritize natural English, exam format, and clear scoring criteria.
topics.imageAlt: TOEIC practice photo: Office workers at desks

photo.imageAlt: TOEIC practice photo: Office workers at desks

selectionCriteria: No copyrighted text in the photo
Suitable for English learning and exam-style practice
